By preparing to leave and breaking through the wall of his house at evening, as if wanting to escape an enemy, the prophet showed the behavior and fate of Zedekiah. When God delivers us, we must glorify him and help others by admitting our sins. Those who are brought to this through suffering learn that God is Lord, and can help others know him.

The prophet had to eat and drink with worry and fear, trembling, so he could express the condition of those in Jerusalem during the siege. When ministers speak about ruin coming on sinners, they must speak as if they understand the terrors of the Lord. Suffering is good, even though it is painful for our bodies, because it improves our knowledge of God.

The Jews hardened themselves in sin, despite God’s patience, which should have led them to repent. It will not be an excuse when speaking badly to say that it is a common saying. There is only a small distance between us and a terrible eternity; therefore we must prepare for the future. No one can avoid a day of judgment unless they seek peace with the Lord.
